lines.name: Aerostat Planet Check
lines.description: Sets up Aerostat building specifics and autobuilding for aerostats. Also Autobuilding most Aerostat capped buildings.

lines.name: Jupiter Check
lines.description: Jupiter wants some other stuff setup for it.

lines.name: HM Check
lines.description: Turn off Droids for the most part here. Should also include a Droid factory off thing too.

lines.name: Molten Job Fixer
lines.description: Solves the issue of not enough workers maybe on Moltens. Jupiters should be fine.

lines.name: Time Waiter
lines.description: Just to give it time to remove Building Heat if need be.

lines.name: Turn off Net
lines.description: Checks for Jupiter Net being finished or Molten

lines.name: Planet Checker
lines.description: Checks for non Aerostat (Core Heat) worlds.

lines.name: Planet Checker
lines.description: Checks for non Aerostat (Core Heat) worlds.

operations.summary: Individual Power Challenge (Lena): roll [11] + skill 1.64k + leader 1.50k (total 3.15k) vs DC 2.37k => Success +158.60 Artifacts

eventQueue.name: Combat challenge
storyLines: The team steps out of the shimmering warp gate into the humid air of a vast river delta, where multiple waterways converge under the shadow of a towering escarpment.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 scans the horizon as an eclipse begins to darken the sky, casting eerie twilight over the landscape.
Suddenly, hostile creatures emerge from the reeds, charging with primal fury.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 opens fire, covering $TEAM_MEMBER_3 who maneuvers for a better position.
The team coordinates shots and dodges, taking down the beasts one by one in a fierce skirmish.
Finally, the last creature falls, and the team catches their breath amid the delta's muddy banks.

eventQueue.name: Team Athletics Challenge
storyLines: With the immediate threat neutralized, the team presses on toward the escarpment, navigating the treacherous delta terrain.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 leads the way, spotting a narrow path across shifting sands and shallow streams.
They link arms to ford a fast-moving channel, their boots sinking into the silt.
$TEAM_MEMBER_4 pulls $TEAM_MEMBER_2 from a sudden sinkhole, muscles straining against the pull.
Together, they climb a slippery incline, using ropes to haul each other up.
Reaching stable ground, they pause, the eclipse now fully underway, dimming the delta below.

eventQueue.name: Social Science challenge
storyLines: At the base of the escarpment, ancient carvings catch their eye, etched into the rock face overlooking the delta.
$TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED, the social scientist, steps forward to examine the symbols, tracing them under the eclipsed light.
Deciphering the patterns, they reveal a forgotten language warning of guardians and hidden paths.
With careful analysis, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED interprets the social hierarchies depicted, unlocking clues to a nearby entrance.
The team nods in approval as the translation provides vital context for their mission.

eventQueue.name: Combat challenge
storyLines: Deeper into the escarpment's shadow, a group of armed scavengers ambushes from hidden crevices, drawn by the warp gate's energy.
$TEAM_MEMBER_3 spots them first and signals the team to take cover behind delta boulders.
Gunfire echoes across the landscape as $TEAM_MEMBER_1 lays down suppressive fire.
$TEAM_MEMBER_4 flanks the enemy, picking off two with precise shots.
In a coordinated push, the team overwhelms the remaining foes, securing the area as the eclipse starts to wane.

eventQueue.name: Team Wits Challenge
storyLines: Faced with a collapsed bridge over a delta tributary, the team gathers to devise a crossing strategy under the fading eclipse.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 suggests using nearby vines and debris to fashion a makeshift span.
Working quickly, $TEAM_MEMBER_1 calculates the load distribution while $TEAM_MEMBER_3 tests the materials.
$TEAM_MEMBER_4 spots a weak point and reinforces it with clever knotwork.
Their combined wits turn the obstacle into a stable path, allowing safe passage to the escarpment's higher ledges.

eventQueue.name: Natural Science challenge
storyLines: On a plateau atop the escarpment, unusual flora glows faintly in the post-eclipse dusk, scattered across the delta view.
$TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED, the natural scientist, collects samples, analyzing the bioluminescent properties with portable tools.
They identify a rare mineral in the soil that could explain the glow, linking it to the delta's nutrient-rich waters.
This discovery hints at potential energy sources, vital for the mission's objectives.
The team watches as $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED documents the findings meticulously.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: Venturing into a narrow cave within the escarpment, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED encounters a massive boulder blocking the path, the air thick with delta mist.
Drawing on inner strength, they brace against the rock, muscles powering through the resistance.
With a mighty heave, the boulder shifts, revealing a hidden chamber bathed in residual eclipse shadows.
Sweat-drenched but triumphant, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED signals the team to proceed.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: Deeper in the chamber, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED faces a sudden cave-in, triggered by unstable escarpment walls overlooking the delta.
But as they push debris aside with raw power, they uncover not just a way out, but ancient artifacts that pulse with unknown energy.
This revelation changes everything—the artifacts suggest the eclipse was engineered, not natural.
Empowered by the find, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED clears the path, urging the team forward.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: Amid the artifacts, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED confronts a guardian drone activated by the disturbance, its form hovering in the dim light.
Channeling focused power, they dodge energy blasts and strike at weak points with improvised tools.
The drone falters under the assault, crashing to the ground near a delta viewport.
Victorious, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED secures the area, the eclipse's influence still lingering in the atmosphere.

eventQueue.name: Social Science challenge
storyLines: In the heart of the chamber, murals depict delta societies thriving under eclipses, carved into the escarpment stone.
$TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED, the social scientist, deciphers the narratives, revealing rituals tied to the artifacts' power.
They connect the symbols to modern parallels, providing insights into potential alliances or threats.
The team absorbs the knowledge, understanding how the delta's people harnessed these events for survival.
With this, the mission concludes successfully, the warp gate humming in the distance.

operations.summary: Individual Athletics Challenge (Victor): roll [19] + skill 3.99k + leader 373.00 (total 4.38k) vs DC 2.34k => Success +156.60 Artifacts

eventQueue.name: Team Wits Challenge
storyLines: The team emerged from the shimmering warp gate into the dim corridors of an abandoned orbital station, its metal walls echoing with the hum of dormant machinery.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 quickly scanned the control panels, deciphering faded schematics to unlock the sealed bulkhead doors.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 cross-referenced old logs, spotting a hidden sequence that bypassed the security lockdown.
Together with $TEAM_MEMBER_3 and $TEAM_MEMBER_4, they pieced together the puzzle, activating emergency lights that revealed a path toward the station's docking bay.
The air was stale, filled with the scent of rust and forgotten industry, as they advanced cautiously, wits sharp against the unknown.

eventQueue.name: Team Athletics Challenge
storyLines: Pushing forward through the station's zero-gravity sections, the team encountered a collapsed walkway over a vast maintenance chasm.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 anchored a makeshift line, muscles straining to secure it against the groaning structure.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 leaped first, propelling across the gap with precise timing, landing to steady the rope for the others.
$TEAM_MEMBER_3 and $TEAM_MEMBER_4 followed, coordinating their boosts to avoid the drifting debris, their breaths synchronized in the tense silence.
Finally reunited on the far side, they pressed on toward the shuttle bay, bodies aching but spirits unbroken in the face of the station's decay.

eventQueue.name: Natural Science challenge
storyLines: Venturing into the station's lab module, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED isolated a peculiar mineral sample extracted from the nearby planetary mines.
Examining it under a salvaged microscope, they noted its unusual crystalline structure, reminiscent of veins running toward a distant spire on the surface below.
Drawing on natural science expertise, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED conducted a series of tests, measuring density and reactivity to confirm it as a rare energy-conducting ore.
The findings suggested the mines were once a key resource hub, potentially linked to the spire's ancient architecture.
With careful notation, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED shared the data, illuminating the team's next steps amid the station's flickering consoles.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: As alarms blared from a breached containment unit in the station's core, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED confronted a rogue automated defense drone, its power surges crackling through the air.
Channeling inner strength, they dodged laser bursts, using a scavenged energy rod to counter the machine's assaults.
With calculated strikes, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED overloaded the drone's circuits, sparks flying as it powered down in a heap of twisted metal.
The encounter left the corridor scorched, but $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED emerged victorious, securing the path for the team to proceed toward the mine access elevators.
Adrenaline still pumping, they regrouped, ready for whatever lay in the depths below.

eventQueue.name: Team Athletics Challenge
storyLines: Descending via the station's rickety lift into the upper levels of the planetary mines, the team faced a labyrinth of unstable tunnels riddled with cave-ins.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 led the charge, heaving boulders aside to clear a narrow passage.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 and $TEAM_MEMBER_3 synchronized their efforts, bracing collapsing supports with improvised beams from the station's scrap.
$TEAM_MEMBER_4 scouted for stable footholds, ensuring the group navigated the treacherous terrain without mishap.
Emerging into a larger cavern, they caught their first glimpse of the towering spire piercing the horizon, its silhouette a beacon amid the mine's dusty haze.

eventQueue.name: Individual Athletics Challenge
storyLines: Deep in the mine's winding shafts, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED took point for a solo reconnaissance, squeezing through a tight fissure toward a promising ore deposit.
Balancing on precarious ledges, they leaped across gaps, muscles burning from the exertion in the low-oxygen environment.
Avoiding loose gravel that could trigger slides, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED rappelled down a sheer drop, securing anchors with expert precision.
At the bottom, they discovered ancient markings etched into the rock, hinting at the spire's origins as a central hub for the mines.
Signaling back to the team, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED retraced the path, emerging dusty but with vital intel in hand.

eventQueue.name: Natural Science challenge
storyLines: Amid the mine's core chamber, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED analyzed seismic readings from unstable fault lines, using portable sensors to map vibrations echoing toward the spire.
Identifying patterns in the rock formations, they deduced a hidden geothermal source fueling the area's anomalies.
Through careful experimentation with soil samples, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED uncovered traces of an unknown alloy, suggesting artificial enhancements to the natural veins.
The data revealed that the spire might not be a relic but an active conduit, pulsing with subtle energy.
Compiling the report, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED alerted the team to potential instability, urging haste in their exploration.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: Suddenly, as energy flares lit the mine's depths, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED engaged a shadowy guardian entity manifesting near the spire's base, its form crackling with raw power.
Drawing on reserves of strength, they parried ethereal strikes, countering with focused bursts from their gear's power amplifiers.
The confrontation intensified, with $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED channeling force to disrupt the entity's core, causing it to dissipate in a burst of light.
In the aftermath, remnants of the entity revealed it as a defensive mechanism tied to the spire, guarding secrets long buried in the mines.
Victorious yet wary, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED pressed on, the team now aware of living defenses within the structure.

eventQueue.name: Individual Athletics Challenge
storyLines: With the spire's entrance in sight, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED sprinted through a collapsing tunnel in the mines, dodging falling debris in a high-stakes evasion.
Leaping over chasms and scaling rough walls, their athletic prowess carried them through the chaos, heart pounding with each bound.
Navigating a maze of intersecting shafts, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED outmaneuvered shifting earth, emerging at the spire's threshold just as the path sealed behind.
The feat secured a forward position, allowing the team to regroup and plan their ascent up the towering edifice.
Breathless but resolute, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED signaled the all-clear, the spire's shadow looming overhead.

eventQueue.name: Team Wits Challenge
storyLines: At the spire's summit, accessed via the station's orbital link, the team huddled around a central console, wits tested by an intricate locking mechanism guarding the core artifact.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 decoded symbolic engravings, linking them to mine patterns observed earlier.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 proposed a sequence based on energy flows from the station's logs, while $TEAM_MEMBER_3 and $TEAM_MEMBER_4 verified against spire blueprints.
Collaborating seamlessly, they input the solution, deactivating safeguards and retrieving the ancient device.
As the warp gate hummed back to life, the team retreated, mission accomplished amid the echoes of the integrated station, mine, and spire complex.

operations.summary: Team Athletics Challenge: roll [14,19,1,10] + skill 8.35k (total 8.39k) vs DC 6.26k => Success +156.60 Artifacts

eventQueue.name: Combat challenge
storyLines: The team steps out of the warp gate onto the dusty surface of the remote planet, immediately spotting hostile drones swarming from the nearby spaceport ruins.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 takes point, firing precise shots to disable the lead drone while $TEAM_MEMBER_2 provides covering fire.
The group advances methodically, coordinating their movements to avoid the drones' erratic patterns.
Amid the chaos, $TEAM_MEMBER_3 spots a structural weakness in the drones' formation and exploits it with a well-placed grenade.
The skirmish ends with the last drone crashing into the ground, its impact sending up a plume of dust near an old shipwreck site.
The team regroups, checking for injuries and scanning the horizon for more threats.

eventQueue.name: Team Athletics Challenge
storyLines: With the immediate danger cleared, the team faces a rugged ravine blocking their path to the spaceport's central hub.
They work together to rig a makeshift bridge using salvaged cables from the shipwreck debris scattered around.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 and $TEAM_MEMBER_2 haul the heavy beams into place, their muscles straining under the weight.
$TEAM_MEMBER_3 secures the anchors, ensuring stability against potential aftershocks from the impact crater nearby.
$TEAM_MEMBER_4 tests the structure first, crossing carefully before signaling the others to follow.
The team crosses one by one, their coordinated effort turning the obstacle into a minor delay in their mission.

eventQueue.name: Combat challenge
storyLines: As they approach the spaceport's outer perimeter, a group of armed scavengers emerges from the shadows of a massive shipwreck, opening fire without warning.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 dodges behind a crumpled hull section, returning fire with calculated bursts.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 flanks the enemy position, using the impact-damaged terrain for cover.
$TEAM_MEMBER_3 provides suppressive fire, pinning down the scavengers while $TEAM_MEMBER_4 maneuvers to disarm a tripwire trap.
The battle intensifies as bullets ricochet off the twisted metal, but the team's tactics prevail, forcing the scavengers to retreat into the ruins.
The area falls silent, save for the echo of distant impacts from unstable wreckage.

eventQueue.name: Natural Science challenge
storyLines: Deeper into the spaceport, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED examines soil samples from the impact site where the shipwreck occurred, identifying unusual radiation patterns.
They carefully collect data using a handheld scanner, noting how the crash has altered the local ecosystem.
Cross-referencing with known planetary records, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED deduces the crash was no accident but involved high-velocity debris.
This insight reveals potential hazards in the soil, guiding the team away from contaminated zones.
The analysis complete, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED shares the findings, enhancing the team's understanding of the site's dangers.

eventQueue.name: Natural Science challenge
storyLines: Further analysis is needed on organic remnants found in the shipwreck's cargo hold, so $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED conducts a detailed biological scan.
They isolate samples of decayed plant matter, determining it originated from a distant world affected by similar impacts.
Using field equipment, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED tests for toxins, uncovering traces that could explain the spaceport's abandonment.
The results suggest the shipwreck introduced invasive species, now thriving in the altered environment.
$TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED documents everything meticulously, providing crucial data for the mission's success.

eventQueue.name: Social Science challenge
storyLines: Encountering ancient murals in the spaceport's control room, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED deciphers the symbolic language to understand the local culture's history.
They interpret depictions of shipwrecks and impacts as warnings of recurring cosmic events.
By correlating the imagery with social patterns, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED uncovers rituals tied to survival in such disasters.
This knowledge reveals hidden alliances among survivors, potentially useful for alliances.
$TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED notes key phrases that could aid in future interactions with any remaining inhabitants.

eventQueue.name: Individual Athletics Challenge
storyLines: A narrow ledge collapses underfoot, isolating $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED from the group near the shipwreck's edge.
They quickly assess the drop, spotting handholds in the impact-scarred rock face below.
With steady breaths, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED climbs down, muscles burning from the exertion.
Reaching the bottom, they navigate a debris-filled path, leaping over gaps widened by the crash.
Finally, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED ascends the other side, rejoining the team with vital intel on a hidden entrance to the spaceport's core.

eventQueue.name: Combat challenge
storyLines: Reunited, the team is ambushed by a larger force of scavengers, now reinforced and using the shipwreck as a fortified position.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 leads the counterattack, but discovers the enemies are not mere looters but organized survivors from the impact event.
$TEAM_MEMBER_2 adapts tactics on the fly, targeting their communication devices to sow confusion.
$TEAM_MEMBER_3 and $TEAM_MEMBER_4 push forward, clearing paths through the wreckage amid intense firefight.
The combat turns fierce, with bullets impacting nearby structures, but the team's resolve holds, driving back the assailants.
In the aftermath, they realize these 'scavengers' hold keys to the spaceport's secrets.

eventQueue.name: Team Athletics Challenge
storyLines: To access the spaceport's inner vault, the team must scale a towering wall of fused shipwreck debris, slick from recent impacts.
They coordinate their climb, passing ropes and tools to each other for support.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1 anchors the line at the base, while $TEAM_MEMBER_2 pulls themselves up first to secure the midpoint.
$TEAM_MEMBER_3 and $TEAM_MEMBER_4 follow, their combined strength overcoming the unstable sections.
Reaching the top, they survey the area, spotting more evidence of the catastrophic shipwreck below.
The effort leaves them winded but positioned for the final push into the vault.

eventQueue.name: Social Science challenge
storyLines: Inside the vault, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED engages with holographic records of the spaceport's logs, analyzing social dynamics from the pre-impact era.
They piece together accounts of crew interactions during the shipwreck, revealing underlying conflicts that led to the disaster.
By studying communication patterns, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED identifies a betrayal that caused the impact.
This revelation connects to the current survivors, suggesting a way to negotiate peace or extract information.
$TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED compiles a report, turning historical data into actionable strategy for the team's extraction.

operations.summary: Social Science challenge (Esme): roll [12] + skill 2.15k + leader 925.00 (total 3.09k) vs DC 2.32k => Success +155.00 Artifacts

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: The team stepped out of the shimmering warp gate, emerging into the dusty confines of an abandoned outpost on a barren world.
$TEAM_MEMBER_1, $TEAM_MEMBER_2, $TEAM_MEMBER_3, and $TEAM_MEMBER_4 scanned the horizon, spotting crumbling structures and faint heat signatures from old kilns in the distance.
Their mission: to investigate and align any functional tech that could reveal the outpost's secrets.
But first, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED had to overpower a locked gate mechanism, forcing it open with raw strength to access the main compound.

eventQueue.name: Team Wits Challenge
storyLines: With the gate breached, the team huddled around a holographic map flickering in the outpost's control room.
They pieced together clues from scattered data logs, using their collective wits to decipher the layout and plan a path toward the central kiln.
Debating strategies, they aligned their ideas to avoid patrols of automated drones that guarded the perimeter.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED pushed forward alone, confronting a massive debris pile blocking the entrance to a kiln chamber.
Gritting their teeth, they heaved against the rusted metal beams, muscles straining to clear the way and reveal a hidden passage deeper into the outpost.

eventQueue.name: Individual Athletics Challenge
storyLines: The path led to a sheer cliff within the outpost's ravine, where $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED had to scale the jagged rocks.
Leaping from ledge to ledge, they navigated the treacherous ascent, their athletic prowess ensuring they reached the top without a fatal slip.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: Deeper inside, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED encountered a sealed vault door reinforced with energy fields.
Summoning all their power, they smashed through the barriers, shards of metal flying as the door gave way to expose an alignment console humming with latent energy.

eventQueue.name: Team Wits Challenge
storyLines: Regrouping at the console, the team analyzed the intricate patterns displayed on its screens.
Pooling their wits, they experimented with sequences, aligning symbols that corresponded to the outpost's kiln operations and unlocking a subterranean level.

eventQueue.name: Individual Athletics Challenge
storyLines: In the dim tunnels below, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED faced a collapsing bridge over a chasm filled with kiln exhaust vents.
With precise timing and athletic agility, they dashed across, dodging falling rocks and leaping gaps to secure a foothold on the other side.

eventQueue.name: Individual Power Challenge
storyLines: Emerging into a forgotten chamber, $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED discovered a guardian construct activated by the intrusion.
Channeling their inner power, they engaged in a fierce struggle, dismantling the machine's defenses piece by piece until it powered down, revealing a cache of alignment artifacts.
But as the dust settled, faint whispers echoed from the walls, hinting at something alive within the outpost's depths.

eventQueue.name: Social Science challenge
storyLines: $TEAM_MEMBER_SELECTED, drawing on their expertise as a social scientist, interpreted ancient inscriptions on the chamber walls.

They analyzed the societal symbols, piecing together the story of the outpost's original inhabitants who had aligned their kilns for a ritual of unity, uncovering clues to a hidden alliance that could change their mission's outcome.

eventQueue.name: Team Wits Challenge
storyLines: With new insights, the team converged on the central kiln, wits sharp as they integrated the artifacts into the alignment mechanism.

They worked in unison, solving the final puzzle that activated the outpost's core, illuminating the entire structure and securing their objective amid rising tensions from an unexpected seismic rumble.
